what: Your Package Title in Title Case
title: Your Package Title in Title Case
text: vimc.rpkg.template template package repository future VIMC R packages based. use template, select vimc.rpkg.template drop-menu Repository template creating new repository VIMC GitHub organisation. Replace instances "vimc.rpkg.template" package name. Make sure also: Edit DESCRIPTION appropriate correct package information, including authors; Edit files R/, tests/, vignettes/ suit package; Add spell check running usethis::use_spell_check(lang = "en-GB"); Remove instructions README.Rmd, re-render .md file using devtools::render_readme().

title: Your Package Title in Title Case
text: NOTE: Remove comment installation sources appropriate. Remember add package VIMC R-universe. can install development version vimc.rpkg.template VIMC R-universe : GitHub GitHub :
code: installation from R-universe install.packages(   "vimc.rpkg.template",    repos = c(     "https://vimc.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"   ) ) install.packages("pak") pak::pak("vimc/vimc.rpkg.template")
